title: 用引用和原文摘录来「锚定」回答
title_en: Use Citations and Direct Quotes to Ground Responses

body.goal: 让 Claude 的回答有据可查，减少凭空编造
steps: 对于长文档（>20k tokens），先让 Claude 逐字摘录相关原文，再基于摘录回答问题
要求 Claude 为每个断言标注出处，例如 '根据第3段："原文..."'
加入自我验证步骤：Claude 生成回答后，逐条检查——能否从原文中找到支持引用？找不到的必须撤回
这个方法本质上是把「自由生成」变成了「检索+摘要」，大幅收窄了幻觉空间

body_en.goal: Make Claude's responses verifiable and reduce fabrication
steps: For long documents (>20k tokens), ask Claude to extract word-for-word quotes first, then answer based on those quotes
Require Claude to cite sources for each claim, e.g. 'According to paragraph 3: "exact quote..."'
Add a self-verification step: after generating a response, Claude checks each claim — can it find a supporting quote? If not, it must retract
This essentially transforms 'free generation' into 'retrieval + summarization', drastically narrowing the hallucination space
